title: Apply cultural significance to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites and landscapes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply cultural significance to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites and landscapes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine cultural significance

pcs.text: Ensure cultural Knowledge Holders inform the decision-making process to determine the cultural significance of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites and places
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure cultural Knowledge Holders inform the decision-making process to determine the cultural significance of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites and places?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure cultural Knowledge Holders inform the decision-making process to determine the cultural significance of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites and places.

pcs.text: Acknowledge the determination of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples as the primary source, and owners of information about the cultural significance of a particular site and landscape
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Acknowledge the determination of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples as the primary source, and owners of information about the cultural significance of a particular site and landscape?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Acknowledge the determination of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples as the primary source, and owners of information about the cultural significance of a particular site and landscape.

pcs.text: Seek permission from appropriate local cultural Knowledge Holders and/or Cultural Authority to collect and share cultural knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek permission from appropriate local cultural Knowledge Holders and/or Cultural Authority to collect and share cultural knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek permission from appropriate local cultural Knowledge Holders and/or Cultural Authority to collect and share cultural knowledge.

pcs.text: Acknowledge and respect traditional knowledge and practices in managing Country and environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Acknowledge and respect traditional knowledge and practices in managing Country and environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Acknowledge and respect traditional knowledge and practices in managing Country and environment.

pcs.text: Investigate and record Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander history and beliefs embedded in a place of cultural significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander history and beliefs embedded in a place of cultural significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander history and beliefs embedded in a place of cultural significance.

pcs.text: Investigate and record the embodiment of cultural significance in the place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record the embodiment of cultural significance in the place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record the embodiment of cultural significance in the place.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine cultural significance

elements.title: Conduct a significance assessment on an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander site

pcs.text: Determine the difference between an assessment of cultural significance and a statement of cultural significance in consultation with stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the difference between an assessment of cultural significance and a statement of cultural significance in consultation with stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the difference between an assessment of cultural significance and a statement of cultural significance in consultation with stakeholders.

pcs.text: Consult with colleagues and experts to identify factors that may impact on the assessment, and incorporate them into planning work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with colleagues and experts to identify factors that may impact on the assessment, and incorporate them into planning work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with colleagues and experts to identify factors that may impact on the assessment, and incorporate them into planning work.

pcs.text: Collect information relevant to the assessment of cultural significance in collaboration with relevant experts and/or Cultural Authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect information relevant to the assessment of cultural significance in collaboration with relevant experts and/or Cultural Authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect information relevant to the assessment of cultural significance in collaboration with relevant experts and/or Cultural Authorities.

pcs.text: Assess the cultural significance of the site in accordance with the Burra Charter guidelines and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the cultural significance of the site in accordance with the Burra Charter guidelines and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the cultural significance of the site in accordance with the Burra Charter guidelines and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare a statement of cultural significance consistent with the assessment findings, in collaboration with relevant experts in Community, and/or Cultural Authorities and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a statement of cultural significance consistent with the assessment findings, in collaboration with relevant experts in Community, and/or Cultural Authorities and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a statement of cultural significance consistent with the assessment findings, in collaboration with relevant experts in Community, and/or Cultural Authorities and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Seek feedback from colleagues and stakeholders on statement of significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek feedback from colleagues and stakeholders on statement of significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek feedback from colleagues and stakeholders on statement of significance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct a significance assessment on an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander site

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
